query:
SELECT wh.id, wh.gestanteId, wh.templateId, wh.nomeGestante, wh.sentAt,
       TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, LAG(wh.sentAt) OVER (ORDER BY wh.sentAt), wh.sentAt) as seconds_since_prev
FROM whatsappHistorico wh
WHERE DATE(wh.sentAt) = CURDATE()
AND wh.templateId IS NOT NULL
AND TIME(wh.sentAt) BETWEEN '11:59:50' AND '12:00:30'
ORDER BY wh.sentAt
command:

       TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, LAG(wh.sentAt) OVER (ORDER BY wh.sentAt), wh.sentAt) as seconds_since_prev

AND wh.templateId IS NOT NULL
